page.title: Storage & Warehousing
hero.heading: Storage Excellence: Secure, Flexible, and Strategically Located
hero.desc: Your cargo doesn't always move in a straight line. Between international shipments, customs clearance, and delivery scheduling, you need a reliable place to store your goods safely. MH Cargo provides secure, flexible warehousing solutions designed to keep your supply chain flowing — without interruption.
included.title: What is included in this service
included.desc: We provide more than just a space to store your goods. Our warehousing solutions are fully integrated with our freight services — giving you a seamless experience from arrival to final delivery.
feature1.title: Short-Term Storage:
feature1.desc: Flexible storage solutions for goods in transit between international shipments. Whether you need to hold cargo for a few days or a few weeks, we provide secure, monitored space tailored to your schedule.
feature2.title: Long-Term Warehousing:
feature2.desc: For businesses that need a reliable base in Morocco for their inventory. We manage your stock with full traceability, giving you visibility over your goods at all times.
feature3.title: Cross-Docking & Distribution:
feature3.desc: Streamline your supply chain by transferring goods directly from inbound shipments to outbound transport with minimal handling time. Ideal for businesses managing high-volume, time-sensitive flows.
why.title: Why Choose Storage with MH Cargo?
why.desc: Our warehousing is not a standalone service — it is fully integrated with our air, sea, and road freight operations. This means your goods move seamlessly from storage to shipment without switching providers or losing time.
why.bullet1: Secure, monitored facilities in strategic locations
why.bullet4: Seamless integration with our freight services
why.bullet5: Dedicated team managing your stock professionally
